title: Snopes fact-check
text: A graphic video showing a man being whipped while tied to a post is frequently shared online with the claim that it captures vigilantes performing an ISIS-style execution on a pedophile who was caught molesting a 2-year-old child. This rumor appears to have originated with a September 2016 article published on the Romanian web site Stiri Mondene but received wider attention nearly a year later when notorious purveyors of misinformation Neon Nettle and Your News Wire published a pair of articles about it in October 2017. Since then, a number of other disreputable websites have picked up on the story, including Cvikas , The Unknown But Not Hidden , and NYNews.Today , before the claim was rehashed yet again by the danfekhabar.com website in October 2018:
